zotero.abstractNote: Saliency models have reached high performance on standard benchmarks. However, it remains unclear how well these models generalize to out-of-domain data and whether their predictions are well-calibrated. In this paper, we introduce DeepGaze IIE, a new state-of-the-art saliency model that achieves superior performance on the MIT Saliency Benchmark. We show that DeepGaze IIE is well-calibrated and generalizes significantly better to out-of-domain data than previous models. We further provide a comprehensive analysis of the factors that contribute to the performance and calibration of saliency models, and we propose a new evaluation protocol for saliency models that accounts for both performance and calibration.
